title: Snap Inc (SNAP) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text:
Snap Inc (SNAP) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights

Financial Performance

Snap delivered strong Q3 2024 results with total revenue reaching $1.37 billion, representing a 15% year-over-year increase. The company's advertising revenue climbed to $1.25 billion (up 10%), while other revenue sources more than doubled to $123 million.

Profitability metrics improved significantly. Adjusted EBITDA grew to $132 million from $40 million in the prior year, and the company generated $72 million in free cash flow. The net loss narrowed to $153 million compared to $368 million year-over-year.

User Growth and Engagement

Daily active users expanded by 37 million to reach 443 million, demonstrating sustained platform growth. The company's premium subscription service, Snapchat+, more than doubled year-over-year to exceed 12 million subscribers.

Advertising Trends

Direct response advertising increased 16% year-over-year, with total active advertisers more than doubling. However, brand-oriented advertising declined 1%, reflecting weak consumer discretionary demand. Total eCPMs decreased roughly 7% as inventory growth outpaced advertising demand.

Strategic Initiatives

CEO Evan Spiegel highlighted the cautious rollout of Simple Snapchat, designed to improve user experience while managing potential monetization risks. The company is also testing new ad formats including Sponsored Snaps and Promoted Places to drive engagement and advertiser spending.
